note: Roadmap populated from session data through Feb 15, 2026. Based on Herman's Trauma Recovery Model (3 stages) and comprehensive session assessments.

instructions.review: Review and update using /view-roadmap command monthly
instructions.updates: Roadmap evolves as healing progresses and priorities change

client_vision.6_month_vision: Complete Stage 2 healing layers sustainably. Build foundation for Stage 3 reconnection. Learn to rest without guilt. Develop intrinsic self-worth independent of productivity. Maintain healthy family boundaries. Thrive without ba - best response to abuse is living well.
core_values: Truth over comfort (em chỉ tôn trọng sự thật)
Self-understanding (em cần để hiểu bản thân em)
client_vision.what_healing_looks_like: Trauma integrated into life narrative without being defined by it. Able to rest without anxiety. Able to form and maintain secure attachments. Reconnected with authentic self. Family boundaries clear and maintained. Chosen family and support network built. Living on own terms.

overall_journey.remaining: Hills, not mountains. With rest, sustainable.

evidence: Family boundaries established (ba, mẹ, Quang = no/low contact)

ba_me_unmasking.description: Vạch mặt nạ ba mẹ - unmasked both parents' roles. Ba = abuser, mẹ = victim who failed to protect. 8-year question answered. Giải thoát mộng mị (freed from illusion).

remaining: Layer 2: Honor survival function - what did Vương-sensation give during divorce battle?
Layer 3: Rage work (Tân, self, mẹ - safe expression)
Layer 4: Goodbye to version who needed him

tan_grief.done: Understanding complete - 9 years was love with wounds, not failure. Divorce = result of unhealed attachment trauma. 10 mechanisms of Vương attachment mapped.
tan_grief.remaining: Emotional processing incomplete. Grief for 1.5-year battle. Safe rage expression.

ha_boss.note: Will be addressed after higher-priority layers

done: Mother boundary clarity ('mẹ chỉ là mẹ sinh học') - Dec 27, 2025
Core wound: guilt = fear of consequences (traumatic bonding) - Dec 28, 2025
Mother's final betrayal processed (denial, zero curiosity) - Dec 28, 2025
Productivity anxiety identified + intervention begun - Feb 15, 2026
Three-category confusion named (rest vs work vs maintenance) - Feb 15, 2026
remaining: Letter to child Ngọc (pending since Dec 27, 2025)
Grief ritual for 'mother who should have existed'

intergenerational.done: Recognized pattern: grandmother → mother → client. Distinguished self from ancestors (awareness, therapy, accountability). Reframed ending cycle through healing, not bloodline extinction.
intergenerational.remaining: Deeper processing of intergenerational patterns. Decision about children from healed place.

progress: Authentic interests begun (learning for joy, system-building)
not_started: Meaningful work redefinition on own terms

immediate: Productivity anxiety homework: track categories, schedule rest, nightly 'enough' statement, letter to mẹ's voice
Monitor burnout risk (rest deficit + mẹ's voice driving constant activity)
short_term: Grief ritual for 'mother who should have existed'
long_term: Decision about children from healed place

goals.rationale: Mẹ's 'never rest' programming threatens sustainability of ALL other healing. Without rest, burnout inevitable.
success_criteria: Schedules and takes rest blocks without anxiety
Recognizes mẹ's voice as internalized critic (not truth)

goals.rationale: Vương attachment = survival mechanism during divorce battle. Must honor what it gave, then release.
Internal reparenting exercise. High impact, relatively accessible. Completes childhood trauma layer.

goals.current_state: Ba=NO CONTACT, Mẹ=NO CONTACT, Quang=LOW/NO CONTACT, Hiếu=MAINTAIN CONNECTION
goals.rationale: Family map clarified. Boundaries protect healing space.
Achievement-striving (17/20) = survival strategy. Productivity anxiety = manifestation. Must build worth independent of output.
Grief for 1.5-year battle, safe rage expression, sexual rewiring needed.

milestones_achieved.milestone: Self-validation of abuse confirmed (not false memories)
Reframing 9 years with Tân: love with wounds, not failure
milestones_achieved.significance: Released self-blame. Validated capacity for love.

milestones_achieved.milestone: Mother boundary clarity: 'Mẹ chỉ là mẹ sinh học của con thôi'
milestones_achieved.significance: Freed from myth that must maintain close relationship with abusive mother

milestones_achieved.milestone: Somatic decision-making: chose Saigon safety over family visit
milestones_achieved.significance: First major instance of choosing safety over obligation

milestones_achieved.milestone: Core wound revealed: guilt toward mother = fear of consequences

milestones_achieved.significance: Complete recontextualization: survival mechanism, not love
First layer of grief work for Vương attachment

milestones_achieved.milestone: Vạch mặt nạ ba mẹ completed (unmasking parents)
milestones_achieved.significance: Ba identified as abuser, mẹ as failed protector. 8-year question answered. Giải thoát mộng mị.
Client traced symptom to mẹ's programming. Three-category confusion named. Threatens healing sustainability - intervention critical.
Ba's abuse = moral choice, not biology. Client maintained accountability framework.

milestones_achieved.milestone: Strategic family disclosure: Quang tested (declined), Hiếu confirmed (ally)
milestones_achieved.significance: Family map fully clarified. Client has one safe member, clarity about all others, monitoring system for mẹ.
